chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D- 1255 of 2023 (Munawar Ali & others vs. P.O Sindh and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi 10-01-2024. Mr. Pervez Ahmed Kuber, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Shahryar Awan, AAG Sindh ******** The petitioners, who are working with Gambat Institute of Medical Science, Gambat by way of instant petition have sought for direction against the respondents to regularize their services. The petitioners being daily wages employees have got no vested right to seek direction for regularization of their services in derogation of terms of their daily wages employment. Such direction, if is issued then it would amount to denial of right of contest to aspiring candidates for their regular appointment on merit. Such right is guaranteed by Article 25 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Consequently, the instant Constitution Petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly directing the petitioners to apply for their appointment on regular basis whenever such posts are advertised by the respondents formally, if so is advised to them. Judge Judge ARBROHI
